subject: Gaming
title: Gaming and Cognitive Benefits
description: A short lesson to help you apply Gaming and Cognitive Benefits.

hook.text: Action gamers have faster reaction times and better spatial awareness than non-gamers. Gaming trains brains.

buildup.text: Studies show that action games improve attention, decision-making speed, and multitasking ability.

discovery.text: Strategy games boost planning and problem-solving. Puzzle games improve spatial reasoning.

twist.text: The FDA approved a video game as a medical treatment for ADHD in children. Gaming became medicine.

climax.text: Moderate gaming provides measurable cognitive benefits. The key word is moderate.

punchline.text: A video game approved as medicine. Gaming literally heals brains.

quiz.question: What medical milestone did gaming achieve?
options: The FDA approved a video game as treatment for ADHD in children
Doctors prescribed console gaming for arthritis
